title: T-052 — UI: TEC-062 Routing Cost Preview + TEC-063 Resource Utilization Preview
prompt:
# T-052 — UI: TEC-062 Routing Cost Preview + TEC-063 Resource Utilization Preview

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §12.4 TEC-062, §12.4 TEC-063
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206` (bom_cost_panel); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:37-71` (work_centers_screen)

## Goal
Routing cost summary + lightweight resource utilization preview.

Cost preview reads ?volume from input. Gantt-lite uses simple horizontal bar layout.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/routings/[id]/_components/cost-preview.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/routings/[id]/_components/resource-preview.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-062-063-routing-preview.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- Finite-capacity scheduling (04-PLANNING-BASIC)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the preview card renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:37-71, then card layout, total-row formatting, and resource bars match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
2. Given volume input changes, when typed, then totals re-render within 200ms.
3. Given no operations, when rendered, then empty-state copy appears.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + volume reactivity.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-062-063-routing-preview.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not call cost-preview API on every keystroke without debounce.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/bom-detail.jsx:154-206` (bom_cost_panel) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:37-71` (work_centers_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
